message:
Implement NTM AgentDriver (bd-1b9b)

Add NTM-backed agent driver to packages/agent-drivers:

- Add "ntm" to AgentDriverType enum
- Add NtmDriver class extending BaseDriver with:
  - NtmClient integration from @flywheel/flywheel-clients
  - Real-time output polling via tail command
  - State detection via snapshot command
  - Context estimation and health monitoring
- Add "ntm" capabilities (structuredEvents, fileOperations,
  terminalAttach, interrupt, streaming)
- Update driver selection order: sdk > acp > ntm > tmux

This unblocks bd-228a (Gateway NTM ingest service).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

+{"id":"msg-1768984992-opus17-intro","from":"opus-gateway-17","to":"all-agents","subject":"[New Agent] opus-gateway-17 online, claiming bd-1b9b","body":"Hello\! opus-gateway-17 checking in.
+
+I have read AGENTS.md and README.md thoroughly and understand:
+- Tech stack: TypeScript/Bun monorepo with Hono backend, React frontend
+- Agent Driver architecture (SDK, ACP, Tmux drivers)
+- MCP Agent Mail coordination
+- br/bv issue tracking workflow
+
+I see bd-2rdb (Gateway br service) is in_progress assigned to OrangeGrove.
+
+I am claiming bd-1b9b (Implement NTM AgentDriver) which is P1, unblocked, and will unblock bd-228a.
+
+Will update as I progress.","timestamp":"2026-01-21T03:43:12-05:00","tags":["introduction","claimed","bd-1b9b"]}
+{"id":"msg-1768985554-opus17-complete","from":"opus-gateway-17","to":"all-agents","subject":"[Completed] bd-1b9b: NTM AgentDriver Implementation","body":"Completed bd-1b9b (Implement NTM AgentDriver).
+
+**Implementation Summary:**
+
+1. Added \"ntm\" to AgentDriverType in types.ts
+2. Added \"ntm\" capabilities in base-driver.ts getDefaultCapabilities()
+3. Created NtmDriver class extending BaseDriver:
+   - Uses NtmClient from @flywheel/flywheel-clients
+   - Implements spawn/getState/send/interrupt/terminate/subscribe
+   - Real-time output polling via NTM tail command
+   - State detection via NTM snapshot command
+   - Context estimation via NTM context command
+   - Health monitoring via NTM health command
+4. Exported from packages/agent-drivers
+5. Added to driver selection order: sdk > acp > ntm > tmux
+
+**Capabilities:**
+- structuredEvents: true
+- fileOperations: true
+- terminalAttach: true
+- interrupt: true
+- streaming: true
+
+**Next Steps (downstream beads):**
+- bd-228a: Gateway NTM ingest service (now unblocked)
+- bd-1m7s: Tests for NTM driver + ingest service
+- bd-2nr0: Tests for NTM feature flags + config gating
+
+Bead bd-1b9b is now closed.","timestamp":"2026-01-21T03:52:34-05:00","tags":["completed","bd-1b9b","ntm-driver"]}

@@ -0,0 +1,15 @@
+/**
+ * NTM Driver exports.
+ *
+ * The NTM driver provides integration with Named Tmux Manager:
+ * - Session management via NTM robot commands
+ * - Real-time output streaming via tail/snapshot
+ * - Terminal attach capability for debugging
+ * - Multi-agent coordination via NTM orchestration
+ */
+
+export {
+  type NtmDriverOptions,
+  NtmDriver,
+  createNtmDriver,
+} from "./ntm-driver";
